# Rubrion

> IT consulting for SMBs. Whitelabel products (EdgeLetter, Rubrion Store) and bespoke software on Kubernetes and Terraform. Cheap, fast, transparent. SaaS deployment available on request.

Last updated: 2026-06-03

## What we do

- **Whitelabel Product Deployment** — Branded deploys of Rubrion shipped products (EdgeLetter newsletter, Rubrion Store marketplace). Self-hosted by default; SaaS deployment on request.
- **Bespoke Software Development** — Custom web platforms, third-party integrations, and API customization. Fixed-fee consulting engagements with full source ownership delivered to the client.
- **Managed Infrastructure & Operations** — Production-grade Kubernetes clusters and Terraform-managed infrastructure operated by Rubrion. Includes monitoring, security hardening, and on-call response.

## Projects

- **EdgeLetter** — whitelabel newsletter platform. Live: https://edgeletter.rubrion.ai · Source: https://github.com/rubrion/edgeletter
- **Rubrion Store** — whitelabel marketplace platform. Live: https://rubrion.store · Source: https://github.com/rubrion/store
- **Mondesa** (sister organization) — IoT solutions for critical energy systems and wireless sensor network architecture. Live: https://mondesa.org · Source: https://github.com/mondesa

## Who we serve

- **SMBs & Startups** — fast delivery, predictable costs, scalable architecture.
- **Schools & Nonprofits** — cost-effective, community-focused, education discounts.
- **Enterprises** — custom integrations, enterprise-grade security, dedicated support.

## Pricing model

Fixed-fee consulting engagement plus infrastructure passthrough to the client cloud account. No per-seat fees. No proprietary licensing. No offboarding penalty. When usage grows, only the underlying cloud bill grows with it.

## Engagement timeline

Standard projects ship in 6-10 weeks end to end:

1. **Discovery & Planning** (1-2 weeks) — Requirements analysis and architecture design.
2. **Infrastructure Setup** (1 week) — Kubernetes cluster and CI/CD pipeline deployment.
3. **Product Setup & Integration** (2-4 weeks) — Whitelabel deployment and third-party wiring.
4. **Customization** (2-4 weeks) — Branding, custom features, and bespoke modules.
5. **Testing & QA** (1 week) — Comprehensive testing and performance optimization.
6. **Go Live & Support** (Ongoing) — Production deployment and ongoing monitoring.

## Technology

Kubernetes, Terraform, mature community-driven foundations, API-first interfaces. Deploys on AWS, GCP, or Azure. Standard observability, identity, and CI/CD tooling.

## Source access

Most Rubrion projects ship as open repositories under github.com/rubrion (EdgeLetter, Rubrion Store, etc.). Bespoke work is delivered with full source ownership to the client. Clients can fork, self-host, or migrate operations in-house at any time.

## Contact

- Email: [hello@rubrion.ai](mailto:hello@rubrion.ai)
- Form: [https://rubrion.ai/#contact](https://rubrion.ai/#contact)
- Response time: within 24 hours.

## Optional

- [Portuguese (BR) version](https://rubrion.com.br/)
- [Sitemap](https://rubrion.ai/sitemap-index.xml)
- [Schema.org structured data](https://rubrion.ai/) — Organization (Corporation, with Mondesa as subOrganization), WebSite, FAQPage are embedded in the home page.
